---
title: "The Rev. Henry Barter"
---

## The Rev. Henry Barter

**Dates:** (1835/6-24 May 1901)

### Description

Vicar of Shipton-under-Wychwood

### Biography

He married (10 Sept 1863) Elspeth Catherine Moberly, known as Kitty Barter;  he also had a sister Kate Barter who ran a school in Shipton.  Son of the Rev. Charles Barter, Vicar of Sarsden, he was educated at Eton and Merton College Oxford, and became Vicar of Shipton-under-Wychwood in 1868. [Eton Register; <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
